jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at ICAT
jsonLd.description:
ICAT, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ICAT:
ICAT is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICAT!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
